lethality_vs_low_armor.description: Flat armor penetration gains value against low armor targets.
lethality_vs_low_armor.logic: Lower effective armor makes flat penetration more efficient.

percent_penetration_vs_high_resistance.description: Percent penetration gains value against high resistance targets.
percent_penetration_vs_high_resistance.logic: The more resistance the target buys, the more percent penetration removes.

hard_cc_vs_mobile_champions.description: Reliable crowd control gains value against dash-heavy champions.
hard_cc_vs_mobile_champions.logic: Mobile champions lose much of their threat when movement windows are interrupted.

anti_heal_value.description: Healing reduction gains value when enemy sustain changes fight outcome.
anti_heal_value.logic: Buy it when healing is a real fight variable.

survivability_vs_burst.description: Stasis, armor, MR, health or shields gain value when one engage decides the fight.
survivability_vs_burst.logic: If you die before casting, extra damage has no value.
